notes: v0.16.84 — Practice scene fixes + per-archetype mini-boss tiles. MINI-BOSS row is now 4 dedicated tiles (PRISM CORE / MITOSIS / RAIL SENTINEL / HIVE MOTHER) so the player picks which archetype to train against. 10 trainer modes total in a 2×5 grid. Detail card + spawn flow match on kind for BOSS_RUSH. Removed a stale guard that was forcing pending_mode=ARENA when BOSS_RUSH was active (that made the preview show the wrong scene). Scene animations rewritten — CORE DEFENCE has orbiting ship + trail + bullets + periodic core flash; CHAIN LINKS has orbiting ship shooting tracer bullets at the active pad; OVERLOAD GRID has ship flying L-R with correct heading (was backwards), bullets up at gens, gens fire down on overload; MINI-BOSS preview shows the picked kind's actual visual (rotating prism / cell / sweeping beam / drone-orbited queen). Ship heading convention fixed everywhere. Windows only.
